name: Saco & Biddeford Savings Institution
description_short: Maine's oldest bank (founded 1827) offering checking, savings, debit cards, and digital banking with competitive rates and FDIC insurance.
description_long:
Saco & Biddeford Savings Institution is the longest-operating bank in Maine, established in 1827. The institution positions itself as a community-focused hometown bank with a mission to serve with compassion while striving for excellence. It operates with full FDIC insurance backing, providing depositors with federal protection.

The bank offers a range of retail banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, debit cards, and credit cards. A key product highlighted on their website is the Mutual High Yield Savings account, which currently offers 3.00% APY with no large minimum balance requirement. Customers can access their accounts through an award-winning online and mobile banking platform, enabling digital banking and on-the-go account management.

Saco & Biddeford distinguishes itself through its long operational history as Maine's oldest bank and emphasis on community engagement, including sponsorship of local businesses and cultural events. The bank maintains physical branch locations with published hours and provides personalized customer support through online chat and contact options. Their routing number (211272630) is publicly listed, indicating established banking infrastructure.

As a traditional community bank, Saco & Biddeford is best suited for customers seeking established, FDIC-insured banking with local roots rather than specialized financial services. The website content focuses on basic banking products and does not indicate offerings in mortgages, business loans, or investment services, suggesting a retail-focused institutional model. Prospective customers should verify current rates and product availability directly, as website content may not reflect all offerings or real-time rate changes. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Longest-operating bank in Maine with 197-year operational history (founded 1827)
FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government full faith and credit
Mutual High Yield Savings account offers 3.00% APY with no large minimum balance
Award-winning online and mobile banking platform for digital account access
Active community engagement with local business sponsorships and events
Multiple physical branch locations with published hours and in-person support
Online chat support available for customer inquiries
cons: Website does not display current APY rates for checking or other savings products beyond the High Yield Savings account
No information provided about mortgage, business loan, or investment products, limiting service scope
Limited details on account fees, minimum balance requirements, or other terms and conditions
No mention of financial advisory services or wealth management offerings
Geographic limitation as a regional Maine-based institution may limit branch access for non-local customers
best_for: Maine residents seeking FDIC-insured banking from an established local institution
Savers looking for competitive high-yield savings rates with minimal deposit requirements
Customers prioritizing community bank relationships and local business support
diagnosis: Saco & Biddeford Savings Institution is best for Maine residents and regional customers seeking traditional community banking with FDIC protection and a competitive high-yield savings option. The primary caveat is that the website provides limited information on account fees, rate details for other products, and does not clearly advertise mortgage or business lending services, so prospective customers should contact the bank directly to confirm all available products and current terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
